contort.ex: His face was contorted with pain.

contraband.def: 走私、違禁品、禁運的、非法交易的
contraband.ex: The customs officers searched for contraband.

contract.def: 合約、婚約、訂立合約、承包、縮小、感染(疾病)
contract.col: sign a contract, breach of contract, labor contract
contract.ex: He signed a three-year contract with the company.

contraction.ex: Cold causes the contraction of metals.

contractor.ex: The buildings were constructed by an independent contractor.

contradict.ex: The eyewitness accounts contradict each other.

contradiction.ex: There is a clear contradiction between his words and actions.

contradictory.ex: The two reports gave contradictory information.

contrary.def: 相反的、對立的、乖張的、相反、對立面、相反地
contrary.ex: Contrary to expectations, the weather was fine.

contrast.def: 對比、對照、差異、與...對比、顯出差異、形成對照
contrast.ex: His white shirt was in sharp contrast to his black suit.

contribute.def: 貢獻、捐助、投稿、引起、促成
contribute.ex: The discovery will contribute to the development of science.

contribution.def: 貢獻、捐助、稿件、促成因素
contribution.ex: He made a valuable contribution to the project.

contributor.ex: Smoking is a major contributor to lung cancer.

control.def: 控制、管束、統治、對照物、控制、管理、試驗
control.col: under control, out of control, remote control
control.ex: The fire is now under control.

controller.ex: The air traffic controller guided the plane to land.

controversial.ex: Abortion is a highly controversial issue.

convenience.ex: Please call me at your earliest convenience.

convenient.ex: When would be a convenient time for us to meet?

convention.col: annual convention, social convention, Geneva Convention
convention.ex: The annual convention will be held in New York.

conventional.ex: He has very conventional views on marriage.

converge.ex: The two roads converge just outside the town.

convergence.ex: The convergence of technology is changing our lives.

conversation.ex: I had a long conversation with him about his future.

conversational.def: 對話的、口語的、善於辭令的
conversational.ex: The book is written in a simple, conversational style.

converse.def: 談話、交談、相反的、逆向的、相反的情況、逆向
converse.ex: He is always happy to converse with anyone he meets.

conversion.ex: The conversion of the building into apartments took several months.

convert.ex: The building was converted into a library.

converter.ex: The car has a catalytic converter to reduce emissions.

convertible.def: 可轉換的、敞篷車的、敞篷車
convertible.ex: He is driving a black convertible.

convey.def: 傳達、傳遞、運送、轉讓(財產)
convey.ex: Words can't convey how I feel.

conveyance.def: 運送、運輸工具、傳達、財產轉讓證書
conveyance.ex: The document serves as a conveyance of the property.

conveyor.ex: The boxes moved along the conveyor belt.

convict.def: 宣判有罪、使認罪、囚犯、被判有罪者

conviction.ex: She has a firm conviction that education is the key to success.

convince.ex: I tried to convince him to change his mind.

convincing.def: 令人信服的、有說服力的
convincing.ex: That was a very convincing argument.

cooker.ex: I bought a new pressure cooker.

cookery.ex: She is interested in International cookery.

cool.def: 冷的、涼爽的、冷靜的、出色、酷、使變涼、使冷靜、冷靜地
cool.ex: The weather is nice and cool.

cooperate.ex: You must cooperate with the police.

cooperative.def: 合作的、協力的、合作社、合作企業
cooperative.ex: He is a very cooperative worker.

coordinate.def: 座標、套裝、同等的人、協調、整合、平等的、同位的
coordinate.ex: We need to coordinate our efforts.

coordination.ex: The accident was caused by a lack of coordination.

coordinator.ex: He was appointed as the project coordinator.

cope.def: 應付、處理、對付、長袍、斗蓬
cope.ex: He is struggling to cope with the workload.

copper.def: 銅、銅幣、警察、紅銅色的、鍍銅於
copper.ex: The pipe is made of copper.

copy.def: 副本、複本、原稿、複製、影印、效法、模仿
copy.col: copy machine, carbon copy, hard copy, soft copy
copy.ex: Can you give me a copy of the report?

copyright.def: 版權、著作權、版權受保護的、獲得版權
copyright.ex: The book is protected by copyright.

coral.ex: The island is surrounded by a beautiful coral reef.

cord.def: 細繩、電線、(人體)帶、腱、用繩捆
cord.col: umbilical cord, spinal cord, vocal cord
cord.ex: He tied the bundle with a piece of cord.

cordial.def: 熱誠的、衷心的、強心劑、甘露酒

core.def: 核心、果核、最主要的、中心、去掉果核
core.col: at the core, core curriculum, hard core
core.ex: Honesty is at the core of his personality.

cork.def: 軟木塞、軟木、軟木製的、塞住、抑制
cork.ex: He pulled the cork out of the wine bottle.

corn.def: 玉米、穀粒、雞眼、種玉米、醃(肉)
corn.ex: He eats corn on the cob.

corner.def: 角落、街道拐角處、困境、放在角落、使走投無路、壟斷
corner.ex: The house is on the corner of the street.

corny.def: 陳腐的、老掉牙的、鄉巴佬的
corny.ex: He told a series of corny jokes.

corporate.col: corporate identity, corporate image, corporate tax
corporate.ex: The company has a strong corporate identity.

corporation.def: 社團法人、股份公司、大企業、市政府
corporation.ex: He works for a multinational corporation.

corps.def: 兵團、部隊、(由具共同目的之人組成的)團體
corps.ex: He joined the local police corps.

corpse.ex: The corpse was identified as a local man.

correct.def: 正確的、得體的、修正、糾正、批改

correction.ex: The report needs some major corrections.

correspond.ex: Your account of the accident corresponds with hers.

correspondence.ex: He spent the morning dealing with his business correspondence.

correspondent.def: 通訊員、記者、通信者、相當的人或物、相應的
correspondent.ex: She is a foreign correspondent for a national newspaper.

corridor.ex: The office is at the end of the long corridor.

corrosion.ex: The bridge collapsed due to environmental corrosion of its steel support.

corrupt.def: 腐敗的、墮落的、有錯誤的、墮落、行賄、腐蝕、惡化
corrupt.ex: The government was accused of being corrupt.

corruption.ex: The country is struggling to combat corruption.

cosmetic.def: 化妝的、裝飾性的、化妝品、美容品

cosmetics.ex: She doesn't like wearing excessive cosmetics.

cosmic.ex: The scientists are studying cosmic rays.

cosmos.ex: The ancient Greeks believed in the order of the cosmos.

cost.def: 花費、代碼、犧牲、價值、花費、使付出、使犧牲
cost.col: at all costs, cost an arm and a leg
cost.ex: The cost of living is rising.

costly.ex: It was a very costly mistake.

costume.def: 服裝、戲裝、為...設計服裝、穿戲服
costume.ex: Everyone at the party was wearing special costumes.

cottage.ex: They have a small summer cottage in the country.

cotton.def: 棉花、棉布、棉織的、採棉花、理解、喜好
cotton.ex: These shirts are made of pure cotton.

couch.def: 沙發、躺椅、臨床、臥榻、表達、躺在、使躺下、伏下
couch.ex: He was sitting on the couch watching TV.

council.col: city council, local council, Student Council
council.ex: He is a member of the city council.

councilor/councillor.ex: He was elected as a local councilor.

counsel.def: 顧問、忠告、法律顧問、商議、勸告、忠告、建議

counselor/counsellor.def: 顧問、諮詢員、輔導員、律師
counselor/counsellor.ex: He works as a school counselor.

count.def: 數、計算、價值、罪項、數、計算、認為、算入
count.col: count on, count down, keep count
count.ex: Can you count to ten in English?

counter.def: 櫃檯、計算器、籌碼、相反的、逆向的、對抗、反駁、相反、反對、逆向地
counter.ex: He was standing behind the kitchen counter.

counterclockwise.def: 逆時針地、反時針的方向的
counterclockwise.ex: Turn the key counterclockwise to unlock the door.

counterpart.ex: The American president met with his Russian counterpart.

countryside.ex: They live in a beautiful house in the countryside.

county.ex: Oxfordshire is a county in central England.

couple.def: 數個、一對、夫妻、連接、結合、成雙、交配
couple.col: married couple, young couple, a couple of
couple.ex: The young couple looked very happy.

coupon.ex: I used a discount coupon to buy the shoes.

courage.ex: It takes courage to speak your mind.

courageous.ex: It was a courageous decision to make.

course.def: 課程、進程、路徑、一盤菜、追獵、奔流、(液體)奔流
course.col: of course, training course, main course, golf course
course.ex: I am taking a computer course.

court.def: 法庭、球場、庭院、追求、博取、招致、朝廷、宮廷
court.col: take to court, tennis court, basketball court
court.ex: The case is currently in court.

courteous.ex: He is a very courteous young man.

courtesy.def: 禮貌、好意、恩賜、禮貌的、好意的、出自好意、免費的
courtesy.ex: The car was provided by courtesy of a local dealer.

courtroom.ex: The courtroom was packed with people.

courtyard.ex: The hotel has a beautiful inner courtyard.

cousin.ex: He is my first cousin on my father's side.

coverage.def: 覆蓋範圍、新聞報導、保險總額
coverage.ex: The event received extensive media coverage.
